_note: Machine-readable harvest allow-list — the SOURCE OF TRUTH for scripts/check-licence-clearance.mjs (FLOW_PLAN milestone H0). Human-readable mirror: docs/grounding/integration-register.md. This file authorises NO integration code; it is the licence + identity gate that every H1+ harvest must pass. Adding a repo here is a prerequisite for wrapping it, not permission to wrap it (that is plan-gated per CLAUDE.md).

config._override_existing_note: These shippable target dirs already exist as first-party mock servers (FLOW_PLAN 6.3 [OVR]). A harvested live backend WRAPS them behind the existing contract, so the directory's mere existence is NOT proof of harvest — the marker file (created only at H1+ wrap time) is. BLOCK 2b/3 key off the marker for these, off directory existence for genuinely new modules.

elements.governance_gate: every tool output -> Receipt; MIRAGE-gated where retrieval; python_code_executor DISABLED + proven unreachable; own auth; egress allow-list
elements.notes: Highest leverage + highest security surface. WRAPPED at H5 2026-07-07: Apache-2.0 re-verified on-repo at v1.3.1, pinned 9b7ff91d (v1.3.1 = the latest release AT/ABOVE the v1.3.0 RCE-patched floor). ENFORCED FLOOR: rce_floor v1.3.0 + pinned_version v1.3.1 are checked by licence:check BLOCK 5 (semver-gte) so a later bump can NEVER silently drop below the patch. v1.3.0 patched an UNAUTHENTICATED RCE in python_code_executor; the code-execution surfaces (python_code_executor / python_script_runner / read_executed_notebook) are DISABLED at config (compact_mode + exclude_tools) AND proven UNREACHABLE by the gateway deny-list (contract test invokes them and asserts they fail closed before any subprocess forward). Own auth; egress allow-list; least-privilege; runs out-of-process (no Python vendored). Live execution input-gated on the runtime + API keys. NEVER expose the code-executor (G2).

elements.licence: Health AI Developer Foundations (HAI-DEF) terms of use
elements.governance_gate: external hosted model referenced via HTTP only; output re-gated by the frozen verifier + detectors + PPP-TTT (Step 5) and the portal gate (C9) like any Step-4 candidate; no Google code or weights in-repo
elements.notes: MedGemma alternative Step-4 generation backend (MEDGEMMA-ADAPTER-PLAN, 2026-07-11). NO Google source code is wrapped/vendored/forked and NO model weights enter the repo (weights are gitignored + deploy-injected, same posture as the SNOMED CT-AU RF2). The adapter integration/llm-adapter-medgemma.js is a FIRST-PARTY clean-room HTTP client (record-sources / fhir-broker live-backend precedent), endpoint-agnostic, MOCK BY DEFAULT, runtime input-gated on HEYDOC_MEDGEMMA_ENDPOINT + a secrets-seam key. Licence: HAI-DEF terms with a Prohibited-Use Policy (NOT an OSI open-source licence). licence_status=verified reflects an OPERATOR/CLINICIAN ATTESTATION (attested_by KL, 2026-07-11) that MedGemma is cleared for use in this CDSS — a Decision-B ruling recorded in the register, not an on-repo OSI-licence detection. Model version referenced by id (default medgemma-1.5-4b-it, huggingface.co/google/medgemma-1.5-4b-it); served endpoint (Vertex AI / HAI-DEF / self-host vLLM / HF inference) is the operator's deploy choice. Backend is SELECTABLE only (Decision A3): no automatic failover between models; a safety refusal stays BLOCKED_NO_PROOF.

elements.governance_gate: reference only — the PBS Public API v3 client shape informs our first-party pharm-pbs-sync.mjs; no code vendored/wrapped
elements.notes: FL-30 Step 3 (2026-07-13). MIT reference client for the official PBS Public API v3 (data-api-portal.health.gov.au). We do NOT vendor/wrap its code — mcp/servers/pharmacology/data/pbs-formulary.json is a FIRST-PARTY cached, provenance-stamped pull built by scripts/pharm-pbs-sync.mjs (Node fetch, no npm dependency), subscription key via the secrets seam. The underlying PBS Schedule is Cwlth open data (CC BY), recorded with the other clinical DATA sources in mcp/servers/pharmacology/data/data-sources.json (a separate registry — this manifest tracks harvested CODE repos). Reference-only, non-shippable: the licence gate does not walk this row.
